title: markea coccinea
intro: Markea coccinea, also known as the "red Markea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its root and stem, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Markea coccinea include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Markea coccinea is traditionally prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
